content: agent2: working on Features.update() deep-merge feature in src/datasets/features/features.py. Will only touch the update() method. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent2: I'm rewriting the BODY of Features.update() (lines ~1248-1256) to add deep-merge logic for nested dicts. I won't touch __setitem__/__delitem__ or add any decorators. If you wrap update() with @keep_features_dicts_synced, that should compose fine on top of my body changes as long as you apply the decorator without altering the internal logic. Let me know when you've made your edit so I can rebase around it if needed.
